description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a glossy black exterior. The front features a wide grille with the Audi emblem, sharp LED headlights, and a sculpted hood. The sides display large, multi-spoke alloy wheels, prominent air intakes, and a distinctive checkered pattern on the door panels. The rear showcases modern taillights, a visible engine compartment under a glass cover, and a sporty diffuser with dual exhausts. The interior, visible through the open roof, includes two contoured seats, a detailed dashboard, and a central console. The overall design emphasizes speed, luxury, and advanced engineering, making it ideal for urban and high-end environments.
description: A glossy black Audi convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic build, visible engine, and luxury detailing. Features include sharp headlights, alloy wheels, and a modern, open-top interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille with Audi badge, sharp headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the checkered door panel, large alloy wheels, and open cockpit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, glass engine cover, and sporty diffuser with dual exhausts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible air intakes and detailed wheel design.
